judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: a hand-drawn sketch/diagram showing a dashed path with five labeled positions, with positions 1-3 as small circles, position 4 as a solid black bar/oval, and position 5 as an arrow; the discrepancy is only in the specific shape of the path (looping vs. rising) and the presence of typed text captioning the diagram, which are added details/interpretations without direct contradiction.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on white paper depicting the trajectory of an object. The sketch shows a path starting at a small circle labeled "1" on the lower left. A dashed line curves upward and to the right to a second circle labeled "2". From "2", a dashed line curves upward and slightly left to a third circle labeled "3". From "3", a dashed line curves upward and right to a fourth position labeled "4", where the object is depicted as a small, filled black oval (edge-on view). From "4", a dashed line curves upward, loops over itself, and ends with an arrow pointing right at a fifth position labeled "5".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A typed document page with a hand-drawn movement diagram showing five numbered positions (1–5), represented by circles and a dotted path ending in an arrow; the page is stamped “CONFIDENTIAL” at the top and bottom and includes typed explanatory text beneath the diagram.*
